bug: Phone screen showed two overlapping movement control sets.
root_cause: The custom MainCellSwimTouchControls left MovePad was visible while Roblox's native mobile thumbstick was also active.

changes: Custom MovePad/Knob creation is now disabled unless native touch move fallback is turned off.
Touch horizontal swim now relies on Humanoid.MoveDirection from Roblox native mobile controls.
Custom mobile UI now keeps only scuba buoyancy controls: InflateButton, VentButton, and BuoyancyGauge.

device_review_needed: Android: confirm only one left movement thumbstick is visible.
Android: confirm right-side + and - buoyancy controls remain visible and usable.
Quest: confirm no extra phone-only UI appears in VR.
